allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project InfiniteSurvival.xcodeproj -scheme InfiniteSurvival -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -configuration Debug build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project InfiniteSurvival.xcodeproj -scheme InfiniteSurvival -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' build)
